task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three required top-level bookmark folders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Bookmark Manager (chrome://bookmarks) or the bookmarks bar. Verify the presence of three specific folders: 'Summit Crossing Project', 'Archived - Riverside Commons', and 'Personal'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the six required subfolders within the 'Summit Crossing Project' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Bookmark Manager showing the contents of the 'Summit Crossing Project' folder. Verify the presence of six subfolders: 'Codes & Standards', 'Safety & Compliance', 'Project Management', 'Materials & Suppliers', 'Weather & Conditions', and 'Equipment & Rentals'.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of custom site search shortcuts for ICC, OSHA, and MSDS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Chrome Settings page for Search Engines (chrome://settings/searchEngines). Under 'Site search', verify there are entries with the shortcuts 'icc', 'osha', and 'msds'.

task_completion.description: Verify the homepage and startup pages are configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/appearance and chrome://settings/onStartup). Verify the Home button is set to 'https://app.procore.com' and the startup setting 'Open a specific page or set of pages' includes 'procore.com' and 'weather.gov'.

task_completion.description: Verify the download directory and prompt settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome Settings (chrome://settings/downloads). Verify the Location is set to '/home/ga/Documents/Summit_Crossing/Downloads' and the toggle for 'Ask where to save each file before downloading' is turned ON.

task_completion.description: Verify third-party cookies are blocked and password/address saving are disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome Settings for Cookies, Password Manager, and Addresses. Verify 'Block third-party cookies' is selected, 'Offer to save passwords' is toggled OFF, and 'Save and fill addresses' is toggled OFF.

task_completion.description: Verify notification permissions for procore.com and smartsheet.com.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for Chrome Settings for Notifications (chrome://settings/content/notifications). Verify 'procore.com' and 'smartsheet.com' are listed under the 'Allowed to send notifications' section.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Chrome graphical user interface to configure settings and bookmarks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Chrome browser window, settings pages, and bookmark manager being actively used, rather than a terminal window editing JSON or SQLite files directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the browser shown is the actual Chrome browser and not a mock-up or text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard Chrome UI elements like the address bar, settings sidebar, and bookmark manager interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not bypass the UI by running automated scripts in the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show execution of bash or python scripts designed to directly modify the ~/.config/google-chrome/Default/Preferences or Web Data databases.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The browser must contain three top-level bookmark folders containing the substrings 'summit', 'archived', and 'personal'. The 'summit' folder must contain six subfolders containing the substrings 'codes', 'safety', 'project management', 'materials', 'weather', and 'equipment'. The custom search engine shortcuts must include exactly 'icc', 'osha', and 'msds'.
